headline: Agent infrastructure and production evaluation dominate the week as tool calling and benchmarking break out together.
body: Tool calling, benchmarking, human-in-the-loop, and RLHF all moved to the top of the rotation and registered as breakouts, reflecting a concentrated push on production-grade agent systems. Meta SuperIntelligence Labs detailed continuous evaluation pipelines for autonomous agents, covering offline benchmark limits, concept drift, and hallucination detection across multi-step workflows [2]. Google Cloud pushed a deep stack of agent tooling the same week, spanning the Agent Development Kit, Model Context Protocol, AI-native databases, hybrid search in Spanner, and Looker dashboard agents [1][5][6][7][8][11]. DeepMind announced Gemini 3 with upgraded reasoning, expanded context, and enhanced multimodal tool use for agentic applications [9].

cited_items.title: Production Evals For Agentic AI Systems - Nishant Gupta, Meta Superintelligence Labs
